name: No Bake Cookies 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, butter, cocoa, and milk over medium heat.
2. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Let it boil for about one minute before removing from heat.
4. Stir in peanut butter until smooth.
5. Add vanilla and oatmeal when the peanut butter has melted.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
7. Repeat with remaining batter.
8. Allow to cool completely before serving.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
